# references/external/

Sources of authoritative material that originates **outside** the platform. Every file here is a mirror, extraction, or fetch of content owned by an external body (CvTE, onderwijsinspectie, the school). The platform does not author these; it mirrors them for reproducibility and then extracts machine-readable projections.

## Policy

- **Never hand-edit** files in this folder.
- Updates are machine-refreshed: re-download the source PDF, re-extract via a script, commit the diff.
- Extracted projections (e.g. `syllabus-eindtermen.md` from the syllabus PDF) are generated by `build-scripts/references/extract-*.js` scripts and land here alongside the source.
- Yearly deltas (e.g. `reports/exam-program-delta.md`) diff the new extraction against the committed snapshot so curriculum changes are visible in review.

## Initial contents

| File | Source | Refresh |
|---|---|---|
| `syllabus-economie-vwo-2026-versie-2.pdf` | CvTE examenprogramma | yearly download |
| `syllabus-eindtermen.md` + `.json` | extracted from the syllabus PDF | generated by `build-scripts/references/extract-eindtermen.js` |
| `exams/havo-2025-tijdvak-1.pdf` | CvTE havo exam 2025 | download once per cohort |
| `exams/havo-2025-tijdvak-2.pdf` | CvTE | download once |
| `exams/vwo-2025-tijdvak-1.pdf` | CvTE | download once |
| `exams/vwo-2025-tijdvak-2.pdf` | CvTE | download once |
| `inspectie-standaarden.md` | onderwijsinspectie onderzoekskader | manual refresh when framework changes |
| `amstelveencollege_quality_standards.md` | Amstelveen College school-fit overlay | manual refresh when school standards change |

## Why a separate bucket

This folder shrinks the platform's "what humans must maintain" surface. Everything here updates from outside authority, not from internal author decisions. Keeping it separate from `authored/` and `machine/` makes that ownership boundary visible.
